relationships: ber:Asmi yemmut Tom, yella iɛedda i kraḍt n tmerwin n yiseggasen
ber:Win ilan kraḍt n tmerwin n yiseggasen ur meɣɣer ara aṭas
ber:Win yesɛan kraḍt n tmerwin n yiseggasen ur meɣɣer ara aṭas
ber:Yessawal kraḍt n tutlayin, gar-asent tamaziɣt
ber:Asmi yemmut Tom, yella yekka i kraḍt n tmerwin n yiseggasen
ber:Aktaẓɣal la d-yemmal dakken taẓɣelt attan kraḍt n tmerwin n tfesniwin
ber:Aktaẓɣal la d-yemmal dakken taẓɣelt attan kraḍt n tfesniwin ddaw warun
ber:Yeqqel-d s axxam kraḍt n tsaɛtin sakkin
ber:Yebɛed azal n twinest ed kraḍt n tmerwin ed kraḍ n yikilumitren ɣef London
ber:Amahil ad yali ɣef tis kraḍt n tmeddit
ber:Amahil ad ifak ɣef tis kraḍt n tmeddit
ber:Rezfeɣ yakan kraḍt n tikkal ɣer Kyoto
ber:Ziri yeqqim din gar kraḍt d kuẓet n tmikin din
ber:Tom qrib ad yeqfel kraḍt n tmerwin n yiseggasen
ber:Tom yesɛa kraḍt n tkeṛṛusin d yiwen n umuṭu
